companies.name: ON SEMICONDUCTOR CORP
companies.rationale: ON Semiconductor Corporation is identified as a prominent player in the semiconductor industry, as indicated by its classification under SIC code 3674 for semiconductors.

overall_rationale: The research focuses on semiconductor companies classified under SIC 3674, but matching results for multiple companies were limited. Therefore, ON Semiconductor Corp is selected as a primary example due to its known role in the semiconductor industry. The selected form types (10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K) provide a comprehensive overview of its financial and operational status over a three-year period to ensure understanding of current trends and company performance.
